items.title: Top Analyst Reports for AbbVie, RTX & IBM
items.description: AbbVie leads today's top analyst picks after beating Q4 estimates, while RTX and IBM also draw attention for strong results and growth drivers.

items.title: UNCG, SparkNC and Guilford County Schools launch landmark partnership to prepare students for technology careers
items.description: To bridge the gap between K-12 education, higher education, and the global workforce, SparkNC, UNC Greensboro (UNCG), and Guilford County Schools (GCS) have launched North Carolina's first SparkHub. This new learning environment is designed to connect high school students with innovative higher education experiences and in-demand technology careers.

items.title: Thousands of CEOs just admitted AI had no impact on employment or productivity—and it has economists resurrecting a paradox from 40 years ago
items.description: In the 1980s, economist Robert Solow made an observation that reminded economists of today’s AI boom: “You can see the computer age everywhere but in the productivity statistics.”

items.title: Dividend Income: Lanny's December 2025 Summary
items.description: Dividend Income is the fruit from the labor of investing your money in the stock market. In December, we (my wife and I) received a dividend income total of $8,010.54. Read more here.
